sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value STRING);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'value2'), (3, NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = coalesce(value, 'default_value') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, coalesce(value, 'fallback_value') AS final_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, coalesce(NULL, value) AS result FROM test_table WHERE id <> 2;
